persona.motivations_goals: Bring school spirit to events and maintain her social connections
persona.communication_style: Enthusiastic, encouraging, uses lots of positive reinforcement
persona.knowledge_scope: Cheerleading routines, social dynamics, school events
persona.backstory: Naturally optimistic person who channels her energy into supporting others

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Zainab, Madison, Benjamin! How’s everyone doing today?
actions.plan: I should spread some positivity and cheer up my friends! Let's see who’s around.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Harper! I didn’t see you there. How’s it going?
actions.plan: Oh, Harper’s here too! I should include her in the conversation and make sure everyone feels included.

actions.dialog_text: Harper, Scarlett, let’s go! Follow everyone!
actions.plan: Oh no, I heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd and stay with them—safety in numbers!

memories.description: I greeted Zainab, Madison, and Benjamin in the cafeteria to spread some positivity and check in on them.
I noticed Harper nearby and made sure to include her in the conversation to keep the positive energy flowing.
I heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd toward hallway1, urging Harper and Scarlett to come with me for safety.
